title: Java Trident Killers
description: Adds Bedrock Trident Killers to Java Edition!
body:
⚠️ IMPORTANT: USAGE GUIDELINES
If you're planning to use this on a server or modpack,
please refer to:
https://gamedash43.github.io/dash-mcl-licenses/#usage

![Title Text "Trident Killers"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b1cad4f01c6813437b7caa9504d6945f3597080.png)

This datapack brings Bedrock Edition trident killers to your Java world.

## ✨ Features
- **Bedrock:** Bedrock Edition designs work on Java when a carpet is included.
- **Trident Preservation:** Thrown tridents in use in a trident killer won't despawn while in motion.
- **Piston Activation:** When in motion by a piston, the trident damages nearby mobs and credits the kill to the thrower.
- **Looting Compatibility:** The owner/thrower of the trident receives kill credit, allowing looting.

## 🎨 Design
The example provided is just one design—any design that keeps the trident in motion will work.


 ![Example Trident Killer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51cd4ba5a91d8f91f23eb22baa378da4d174bf0a.png)
  
## 🔧 Uninstallation

- **Uninstallation:** Run `/function dash.trident:uninstall` to uninstall the datapack.
